sources.title: Final Approach | Part 1 of 2 | FULL MOVIE | Action | Dean Cain, Ernie Hudson
sources.description:
FBI hostage rescue specialist Jack Bender's skills are challenged when he finds himself aboard a flight hijacked by a radical organization. On ground, Jack's ex-wife, an FAA employee, discovers that the terrorists motives are tied to visions of nuclear grandeur.

Watch PART TWO: https://youtu.be/-yqVQbUYSM8

Dean Cain is an FBI agent who doesn't play by their rules. You do you, Dean.

Dean Cain, Anthony Michael Hall, William Forsythe, Ernie Hudson, Sunny Mabrey, Lea Thompson, Barry Livingston

2007

#deancain #actionmovies #action #erniehudson #thriller #thrillermovies

metadata.Plot: FBI hostage rescue team leader Jack Bender has been sacked for not being a team player, and months later he finds himself in the ultimate hostage nightmare: stuck aboard a plane that's been taken over by a group of well-armed terrorists who threaten to detonate a nuclear weapon unless they receive a billion dollars...
metadata.Actors: Dean Cain, Anthony Michael Hall, Ernie Hudson
